findings.finding: Patients with T2D and chronic stress show 23% faster HbA1c progression compared to matched controls.
findings.recommendation: Request HbA1c test every 3 months instead of every 6 months.

findings.finding: Patients with hypertension + obesity (BMI > 30) have 31% higher 10-year cardiovascular event probability.
findings.recommendation: Discuss statin therapy review with your cardiologist.

recommendations.action: Increase cardiovascular monitoring frequency to every 6 months.
recommendations.basedOn: T2D + Hypertension co-morbidity pattern (n=847 across EHDS SPEs)

recommendations.action: Enrol in a certified stress-management programme.
recommendations.basedOn: Stress biomarker correlation with HbA1c elevation (n=1,203)

privacyNote: All findings are aggregate results (k ≥ 5 participants per cohort). Your data contributed pseudonymously via the Trust Center under EHDS Art. 50 Secure Processing Environment protections.

ehdsArticles.primaryAccess: EHDS Art. 3 — patient electronic health record access rights
ehdsArticles.speProtection: EHDS Art. 50 — Secure Processing Environment for secondary use
